name: Pork Chop'n Potato Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown pork chops in a lightly greased skillet. Sprinkle with seasoned salt and set aside.
2. Combine soup, milk, sour cream, pepper, and 1/2 teaspoon seasoned salt in a bowl.
3. Stir in potatoes, half of the cheese, and half of the French fried onions.
4. Spoon the mixture into a 9x13-inch baking dish. Arrange pork chops over the potatoes.
5. Bake covered at 350 degrees for 55 minutes.
6. Top with remaining cheese and onions; bake uncovered for 5 minutes longer.
